## What

Briefly, what does this change?

## Checklist

- [ ] `fledge lanes run verify` passes (Swift format/build/tests + Rust crate).
- [ ] If behavior changed: updated SPEC.md, added/updated a `conformance/` vector,
      and implemented it in all three parsers (Swift, TypeScript, Rust).
- [ ] TypeScript: `cd js && bun test` and `bun run typecheck` pass.
- [ ] No em-dash characters in committed text (brand rule).
